heroSubtitle.en: A spatial design system that adapts. Type natural language or press ⌘K to reshape the layout.
heroSubtitle.cn: 一个自适应的空间设计系统。输入自然语言或按 ⌘K 切换布局。

aiPrompt.en: Try: make it more Apple / luxury / commercial / editorial...
aiPrompt.cn: 试试：极简 / 奢华 / 商业 / 编辑风格...

openingStatement.en: We design architecture not as pages, but as spatial sequences.
openingStatement.cn: 我们设计建筑般的空间序列，而非页面。

philosophyStatement.en: Each project is not an item — it is a spatial experience.
philosophyStatement.cn: 每一个项目都不是一个条目 — 而是一段空间体验。

aboutText.en: We are a design studio focused on industrial design and visual systems. Through structured methodology, we build clear and sustainable design frameworks for every project.
aboutText.cn: 我们是一间专注于工业设计与视觉系统的设计工作室。以结构化的方法论，为每一个项目构建清晰、可持续的设计体系。

aboutStatement.en: Every object is a node in a larger system. We design the connections that make them meaningful.
aboutStatement.cn: 每一件物品都是更大系统中的节点。我们设计的是赋予它们意义的连接。

editorial.description: Single-column centered, serif display, gallery aesthetic

luxury.description: Ultra-generous spacing, warm palette, serif display, refined details

structured.description: Rigid grid, technical typography, data-driven, corporate aesthetic

desc.en: Minimal system design redefining the unity of form and function through modular thinking.
desc.cn: 极简系统设计，以模块化思维重新定义产品形态与功能的统一关系。

detail.en: This project centers on systematic methodology, building a sustainable and iterative design framework through deep research in materials, craftsmanship, and user behavior. Each product is a node within the system — independent yet interconnected.
detail.cn: 该项目以系统化方法论为核心，通过对材料、工艺与用户行为的深入研究，构建了一套可持续迭代的设计框架。每一件产品都是系统中的一个节点，既独立又互联。

desc.en: Reshaping brand identity through architectural visual language, establishing a complete visual order from logotype to layout.
desc.cn: 以建筑感视觉语言重塑品牌识别系统，建立从标志到版式的完整视觉秩序。

detail.en: The brand system extends from the core logotype to color, typography, layout, and application guidelines. Every element is precisely calculated to ensure consistent visual experience across all media.
detail.cn: 品牌体系的构建从核心标志出发，延伸至色彩、字体、版式与应用规范。每一个元素都经过精确计算，确保在不同媒介上保持一致的视觉体验。
